items.name_en: ❤️Large! Sand Stripes. Large is cool😎, premium, and unique. No height requirement; even around 160cm looks super good. The vibe is instantly elevated! items.name_en: ❤️B-brand pure original check coated canvas tote bag. The body is crafted from brand vintage check eco-canvas + smooth Italian tanned leather, featuring eye-catching decorative check print and contrast topstitching. The material is known for being very wear-resistant and durable, with a low-key and beautiful pattern. The texture is particularly comfortable, and the overall look is very high-end. It comes with a leather-wrapped mirror charm, very low-key yet distinctive. Open top design with a lobster clasp, black canvas lining with patch pocket and zippered interior pocket. Large capacity, practicality is self-evident, and it is comfortable to carry. A favorite for travel and commuting, looks good however you carry it. It has a unique lazy retro style, a must-have for street style. Plus, this bag is particularly durable, dirt-resistant, and timeless. It looks very elegant when worn, a very practical style suitable for all seasons. Don't miss out! Sisters, go for it! Dimensions: 34X28X14cm
